result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed. The raw survey datasets from four waves were loaded and merged using the NSID variable. Household weekly income variables were derived as follows: continuous variables `incwhhcnt14` and `incwhhcnt15` were created from `W1GrsswkHH` and `W2GrsswkHH` respectively, with missing values harmonised to the standard scheme. Banded variables `incwhh16` and `incwhh17` were derived from `W3incestw` and `w4IncEstW`, preserving the 1-12 income bands and mapping missing values. As no banding rules were provided for the continuous sources of waves 14 and 15, `incwhh14` and `incwhh15` were initialized as NA. All derived variables were formatted as requested, and the final analysis-ready file was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
